caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt, appears in a small picture-in-picture window at the bottom of a digital layout. He is positioned in front of a gray wall and remains relatively still, looking toward the camera. The rest of the screen is dominated by a spreadsheet and promotional graphics. A large logo for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" is visible at the top of several sections. A list of names and regions is displayed, including "BRIAN FRANK PACIFIC," "BRIAN FRANK ATLANTIC," "BRIAN FRANK* CENTRAL," "BRIAN FRANK SOUTHWEST," "Kennard Bolt NORTHWEST," and "Kyle Barber SOUTHEAST." At the bottom of the layout, a red bar contains the text "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" next to a "Subscribe" button. The background shows a Google Sheets interface with the title "Tue, 35/22 - 2020-21 Panini Obsidian Basketball FOTL 1st off the Line L...". The scene remains virtually static across the sequence.
